info.name: Aspire - LMS API -Localhost
info.description: API collection for managing courses in the LMS system

body.raw:
{ "title": "Module 1", // "startDatetime": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z", // "endDatetime": "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z", "shortDescription": "Aspire Leaders Program -Module 1", "description": "

Welcome to Aspire!

Congratulations on your acceptance! We are thrilled to have you join the Aspire community and excited to support your growth throughout the program.

Getting Started with Module 1

Your journey begins with Module 1. Over the course of three weeks, you will focus on building self-awareness and fostering personal and professional growth. During this module, you will:

  • Discover and refine your individual strengths.
  • Develop your professional skills: resumes, cover letters, interviews, and LinkedIn networking.
  • Build soft skills — behaviors and attitudes that enhance how you work with others.
  • Engage in a global community and build cultural awareness through peer interactions.

This foundation will guide you in achieving your personal and professional goals.

Watch: Getting Started with Module 1

Module 1 Syllabus

Access the syllabus here:
View Module 1 Syllabus (Google Docs)

", "featured": false, "free": false, "status": "unpublished", "params": { "cohortId": "066e2079-6edd-42f3-88ed-204ac1038d5e" } }

{
  "title": "The Key to Effective Leadership",
  "format": "document",
  "mediaContentSource": "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YT59iYL2Rk0xULkzpI2CNSa6n9KqdTMlUDkcRJyNe6I/edit?usp=sharing",
  "mediaContentPath": "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YT59iYL2Rk0xULkzpI2CNSa6n9KqdTMlUDkcRJyNe6I/edit?usp=sharing",
  "mediaContentSubFormat": "pdf",
  "image": "/images/course-thumbnail.jpg",
  "status": "published",
  "description": "The Key to Effective Leadership",
  "noOfAttempts": 3,
  "attemptsGrade": "highest",
  "idealTime": 30,
  "resume": true,
  "totalMarks": 100,
  "passingMarks": 60,
  "courseId": "{{courseId}}",
  "moduleId": "{{moduleId}}",
  "considerForPassing": true
}

Update an existing lesson
Delete a lesson
Get lesson details by test ID (maps to media.source column)

Upload a media file (video, document, etc.)
Get list of media files with optional filtering
Get a specific media file by ID
Associate a media file with a lesson
Delete a media file
Remove media association from a lesson
Enroll a user for a course
Enroll a user in a course

Get a specific enrollment by ID

response.name: recalculate-progress

request.description: Get user journey by user and cohort. Returns enrolled courses with totalEventLessons and isAttendedOneEvent.
Update course tracking status
Start over or resume a lesson attempt
Update lesson completion by event ID. The eventId maps to lesson.media.source.
Enroll a user for a course
Start a new lesson attempt or get existing incomplete attempt
Generate course-level or lesson-level reports with user progress and activity data. Include lessonId for lesson-level report, omit for course-level report.
Check if a cohort meets the lesson completion criteria based on lesson format, sub-format, and minimum completion requirements.
Returns courses (modules), modules (units), and lessons (contents) for a specific cohort. Can be filtered by contentType.
Update lesson tracking progress based on test results. The testId maps to media.source column.
Check service health and database connection (readiness probe)
Liveness probe - checks if service is running (no DB check)
Readiness probe - checks if service and database are ready
